Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}What would you like to order? Our special today is fresh mackerel![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}...As you might suspect, we don't serve sushi here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh? You're a student, aren't you? Then you must be from Gekkoukan High, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That means... you probably know about the persimmon tree there, don't you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You... truly don't know? Not a day goes by that we don't think about that tree![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}At Gekkoukan High, there's an open courtyard area. The tree grows beside a walkway there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Do you think I'm making this up? I assure you, it's real![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}At Gekkoukan High, there's an open courtyard area. The tree grows beside a walkway there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems there's a persimmon tree[n]somewhere at Gekkoukan High.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Does this elderly couple have[n]some kind of connection to it...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Please excuse my husband. Just consider it the ramblings of an old man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After saying goodbye to the old couple,[n]I decided to leave the bookstore.[n]{f 1 1}
